narrative:
Beavercreek 024 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,046 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.9 percentage points.
